title: Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Police Scotland said it received a report of a "suspicious item" found at the base around 11:25am on Thursday

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth Add Yahoo as a preferred source to see more of our stories on Google.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Police closed off roads leading to RAF Lossiemouth (Image: Peter Jolly) A bomb disposal squad has detonated a suspicious package in a controlled explosion at RAF Lossiemouth.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bomb disposal squad called to RAF Lossiemouth after 'suspicious item' found
